abilities.name: Grinding Halt (Tome)
abilities.description: Immediately gain Armor +2 for duration of this Action.

actions: (1) Flatblade (Labor) | AV: 5 (11) | Rg: y3 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage.
(1) Shield (Labor) | AV: 5 (11) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/2/3 and push 1 yard. Mask Shield Bash: Enemies within p2 pushed 4 yards and gain Stunned.
(0) Protect | Target adjacent gains +2 Defense while in engagement range.
system.notes: Early construct designed to fight alongside human forces and shield them from harm.
